full_text:
Yan Xiang (Wenzi)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Xiang, styledWenzi, was born in Jiangzhao. A man of literary ability, he was sent to deal with Yuan Shu. Later killed by Li Shu. Yan Xiang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Yan Xiang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
